title: StackableTools
description: Why not stack your tools by 8 ?
body:
**You can now stack each tool by 8.**
**It's not limited to tools: you can also stack potions, enchanted books, weapons, armor, and elytra**

Note: To maintain a fair balance, you cannot equip a stack of armor or elytra; you can only stack these items in your inventory. We recommend using Serilum's Stack Refill mod!

You can change the stack size in the config file (config/stackabletools.toml).

Please open a ticket on [Github](https://github.com/YoannDev90/StackableTools/issues) or leave a comment to describe any issues you encounter.

I will not be making versions of the mod for versions lower than 1.20.

You are free to contribute, the project is open-source. 

**Future improvements:**

- support for other mods
- Forge version
- Paper version
- 1.21.x port
- 26.1.x port
